backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Fragrance.Intl marketplace, defining data types and state for users, vendors, products, carts, orders, payouts, and transactions, with role-based access control, Stripe payment integration, and HTTP outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auctions listing, auction detail, vendor auction management, admin panels, trade offers) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities added or modified for auctions, trade offers, orders, payments, and vendor/admin dashboards.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router; defines all application routes including auctions, auction detail, trade offers, vendor, admin, and payment pages within a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Admin component that lists user approval requests with their status and provides Approve/Reject action buttons, using React Query hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel component that lists all auctions in a table with options to cancel or finalize each auction, showing product name, vendor, current bid, end time, and status.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel component that displays all orders in a filterable, sortable table and allows admins to update individual order statuses via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel component for managing vendor payouts and editing the platform commission rate, with a sortable payout table and inline status updates.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small presentational component that renders a color-coded badge for a given PayoutStatus (pending, processing, completed, or failed).
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form component that allows an admin to assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user identified by their principal ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel component that lists all trade offers in a sortable table and allows admins to cancel individual offers via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Card component that displays a summary of a single auction including product image, current bid, starting price, bid count, countdown, and status badge, linking to the auction detail page.

React component that displays a live countdown timer to an auction's end time, updating every second. Supports compact (inline) and full (block) display modes, and shows 'Ended' when the auction has expired.
Renders a responsive grid of AuctionCard components with loading skeleton placeholders and an empty-state message when no auctions are available.
Displays a styled badge indicating an auction's status (active, ended, or cancelled) with color-coded styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: Form component for placing a bid on an active auction, handling authentication checks, input validation, and submission via the usePlaceBid mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a sorted list of bid history entries with bidder principal (truncated), bid amount, and relative timestamp, highlighting the highest bid.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to complete profile setup, blocking dismissal until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: Popover cart icon in the navbar that shows item count and a preview list of cart items, with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, price, quantity controls (increase/remove), line total, and a delete button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Displays a sticky order summary panel with subtotal calculation, item count, and buttons to proceed to checkout or continue shopping.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Renders the final order review step showing cart items, totals, optional shipping address, and a Stripe payment button with validation for physical product shipping.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: A form component for collecting shipping address fields (street, city, state, zip, country) with a country dropdown selector.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A reusable access-denied UI component displaying a shield icon, a configurable message, and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop navigation (including admin/vendor-aware links), cart dropdown, and a user profile dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: A badge component that maps OrderStatus enum values to styled labels with color-coded styling for each status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled).
Renders a visual timeline of order status stages (Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered) with progress indicators, or a canceled state message if the order is canceled.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Displays a single product card with image, category, title, price, stock info, and an 'Add to Cart' button that requires authentication.
Renders a responsive grid of ProductCard components with loading skeleton states and an empty-state message when no products are available.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Provides search and filter controls (keyword input, category, product type, and sort order selects) for filtering the product listing.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: Form component for submitting a counter trade offer, pre-filled with swapped items from the original offer, allowing edits to offered/requested items, cash adjustment, and a note.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: Form component for creating a new trade offer, collecting receiver ID, offered and requested items, optional cash adjustment, and a note, then navigating to the trade offers page on success.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Renders a single trade offer card with offer details, status badge, and action buttons (accept, reject, cancel, counter-offer) using dialogs and alert dialogs for confirmation.
Displays a responsive grid of TradeOfferCard components with loading skeletons and an empty state when no offers exist.
Renders a styled Badge for a trade offer status (pending, accepted, rejected, cancelled, completed) with color-coded classes per status.
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: Form for vendors to create a new auction by selecting one of their products, setting a starting price, and choosing a duration.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: Reusable create/edit product form supporting title, description, price, category, product type, stock, and optional image upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Manages a vendor's product list with options to add, edit, and delete products, displaying each product's price, category, and type in a card layout.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions with status badges and countdowns, and provides a dialog to create new auctions and an alert dialog to cancel existing ones.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Displays a sortable table of a vendor's transaction history, including order ID, date, items, gross amount, commission, and net payout, with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows a vendor's payout history with summary cards for total earned and pending amounts, plus a sortable table of individual payouts with status badges.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Form component that allows a vendor to edit their store profile fields (name, description, contact, logo) and submit updates via the updateVendorProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: Form for new vendor registration that collects store ID, name, description, contact, and logo, then creates the vendor profile and submits an approval request.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for all backend actor calls including user profiles, roles, approvals, products, cart, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Playfair Display and Inter fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, luxury fragrance CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders panels for vendor approvals, role assignment, order management, payout management, auction management, and trade offer management, gating access by admin status.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single auction showing product image, current bid, countdown timer, bid form, and bid history, fetched by auction ID from route params.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Page listing all active auctions in a grid with a refresh button, falling back to a browse-products CTA when no auctions are available.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with a summary panel for authenticated users, showing skeletons while loading and an empty-state prompt when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects a shipping address for physical items, places an order, creates a Stripe checkout session, and redirects the user to Stripe for payment.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero banner, a features section, and a grid of up to 8 featured products sorted by price descending.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Authenticated page listing the current user's orders in reverse chronological order with status badges, totals, and links to order details.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Authenticated page that renders a form for creating a new barter trade offer between users.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page shown after a successful purchase, displaying order status, a progress timeline, item list, and totals for a specific order ID.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Printable invoice/receipt page for a specific order, accessible to the customer, vendor, or admin, optionally showing commission and net payout details.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Page shown when a Stripe payment is cancelled, informing the user they were not charged and providing links to return to the cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Handles the Stripe payment success redirect by confirming the payment via a mutation, displaying loading/error/success states, and auto-navigating to the order detail page after confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders the product marketplace page with a search/filter bar and a product grid, fetching products based on the current filter state.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's incoming and outgoing barter trade offers in separate tabs, with a button to create new trade offers.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Renders the vendor dashboard showing store status, product management link, auctions panel, payouts panel, and a profile editor, with loading and no-store fallback states.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor-only page that renders the product list manager for an approved vendor, with guards for unauthenticated users, unapproved vendors, and missing store IDs.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Vendor registration page that shows a registration form for new vendors, a pending state after submission, and a redirect prompt if the user is already an approved vendor.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Provides utility functions for Stripe Checkout integration, including building success/cancel redirect URLs and parsing the checkout session response from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, gold, cream, bronze, sidebar, etc.), custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Includes the typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3), summarizing that the project is expanding with an Auction system (bidding, timers) and a Barter/trade-offer system, and listing all existing implemented features with their IDs, titles, and requirement references.
